" Oh… As always messing up, isn’t that right?
——
2 weeks before the mistake.
——
Brandon was buying ice cream, one with 2 scoops of course, vanilla and chocolate, so yummy! It was time to pay, so, grabbing his treat with his left hand, and the money with the other, he started to count. One, two, three and— uh oh. He was short on just one dollar. He looked backwards nervously, the line was getting long and there was no extra money on his pocket.

”So? Are you going to pay or what, kiddo?”"
